ambiguity.description: Ambiguity score must be ≤ 0.2 to pass Oracle gate

convergence.description: Ontology convergence similarity must be ≥ 0.95 to pass Genesis gate

consensus.description: Consensus percentage must be ≥ 66% (supermajority) to pass Pantheon/Tribunal gate. Set to 0.66 because 2/3 = 0.6667 must pass and float comparison is exact.

semantic.description: Semantic/quality score must be ≥ 0.8 to pass Tribunal/Evolve gate

mechanical.description: All build/lint/test/type-check must PASS; ENV_UNAVAILABLE yields MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED

evolve_dimension_minimum.description: Each individual dimension must be >= 0.6 for Evolve convergence; overall >= 0.8 alone is insufficient
